name: gate-counter
description: Festival gate counter POC: MQTT + computer vision + realtime dashboard

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,gA,gB,gC,gD,cam -c yellow,cyan,green,green,magenta,magenta,blue "pnpm --filter dashboard-api dev" "pnpm --filter dashboard-web dev" "pnpm gate:entry-1" "pnpm gate:entry-2" "pnpm gate:exit-1" "pnpm gate:exit-2" "pnpm gate:webcam"
scripts.gate:entry-1: cd packages/gate-agent && uv run python -m gate_agent --config configs/gate-entry-1.yaml
scripts.gate:entry-2: cd packages/gate-agent && uv run python -m gate_agent --config configs/gate-entry-2.yaml
scripts.gate:exit-1: cd packages/gate-agent && uv run python -m gate_agent --config configs/gate-exit-1.yaml
scripts.gate:exit-2: cd packages/gate-agent && uv run python -m gate_agent --config configs/gate-exit-2.yaml
scripts.gate:webcam: cd packages/gate-agent && uv run python -m gate_agent --config configs/gate-webcam.yaml
scripts.gate:webcam-2: cd packages/gate-agent && uv run python -m gate_agent --config configs/gate-webcam-2.yaml
scripts.gate:crowd-stage: cd packages/gate-agent && uv run python -m gate_agent --config configs/gate-crowd-stage.yaml
scripts.list-cameras: cd packages/gate-agent && uv run python scripts/list_cameras.py
scripts.broker:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d mosquitto
